sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30781" key="e)qelo/pornos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐθελό-πορνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n30781.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">voluntary catamite</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0237.tlg001:21:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anacr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
